mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ea_user_datasource_permission ( user_id, datasource_id, permission_type, creator_id, updater_id, deleted ) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.datasourceId}, #{item.permissionType}, #{item.creatorId}, #{item.updaterId}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE ea_user_datasource_permission SET deleted = id, updater_id = #{updaterId}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, datasource_id, permission_type, created_time, updated_time, creator_id, updater_id, deleted FROM ea_user_datasource_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
